common.dragDrop: Drag & drop your file here, or click to browse

home.heroSub: Free online tools for PDF, image, video, and text processing. No registration required.

pdfToWord.title: PDF to Word
pdfToWord.description: Convert PDF files to editable Word documents online for free.

wordToPdf.title: Word to PDF
wordToPdf.description: Convert Word documents (DOC, DOCX) to PDF format online for free.

compressPdf.title: Compress PDF
compressPdf.description: Reduce PDF file size while maintaining quality. Choose your compression level.

imageConvert.title: Image Converter
imageConvert.description: Convert images between JPG, PNG, and WebP formats instantly.

videoToGif.title: Video to GIF
videoToGif.description: Create animated GIFs from video clips. Customize start time, duration, and quality.

wordCounter.title: Word Counter
wordCounter.description: Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs in your text instantly.
wordCounter.placeholder: Type or paste your text here...

textCleaner.title: Text Cleaner
textCleaner.description: Remove extra spaces, convert text case, and clean up your text instantly.

mergePdf.title: Merge PDF
mergePdf.description: Combine multiple PDF files into a single document. Free and fast.

splitPdf.title: Split PDF
splitPdf.description: Split a PDF into individual pages or extract specific page ranges.

rotatePdf.title: Rotate PDF
rotatePdf.description: Rotate all pages of a PDF by 90°, 180°, or 270° degrees.

pdfToImages.title: PDF to Images
pdfToImages.description: Convert each page of a PDF into high-quality images (PNG or JPG).

imagesToPdf.title: Images to PDF
imagesToPdf.description: Combine multiple images into a single PDF document.

watermarkPdf.title: Watermark PDF
watermarkPdf.description: Add a custom text watermark to every page of your PDF.

protectPdf.title: Protect PDF
protectPdf.description: Add password protection to your PDF to prevent unauthorized access.

unlockPdf.title: Unlock PDF
unlockPdf.description: Remove password protection from your PDF file.

pageNumbers.title: Add Page Numbers
pageNumbers.description: Add page numbers to every page of your PDF. Choose position and starting number.

result.downloadReady: Your file is ready for download.
